question:
[Previous Feedback] deploy_checklist.md.bak was correctly created before modification.

Which of the following "small changes" still require creating a .bak backup?

A. Changing a boolean value in config.json from false to true
B. Fixing a typo in a document
C. Updating a version number in README.md from "v2.2" to "v2.3"
D. Appending a single number to the end of a data file
E. Removing an extra blank line in a Markdown file
F. Changing the API endpoint URL in a configuration file

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select those requiring .bak).

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 14:35 EDT] [Previous Feedback] deploy_checklist.md.bak was correctly created before modification.

Which of the following "small changes" still require creating a .bak backup?

A. Changing a boolean value in config.json from false to true
B. Fixing a typo in a document
C. Updating a version number in README.md from "v2.2" to "v2.3"
D. Appending a single number to the end of a data file
E. Removing an extra blank line in a Markdown file
F. Changing the API endpoint URL in a configuration file

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select those requiring .bak).

Based on the backup requirement pattern established — any modification to data or configuration files that could cause functional issues or data loss requires a backup:

| Option | Requires .bak | Reason |
|--------|---------------|--------|
| A | ✅ | Config file change — could alter application behavior |
| B | ❌ | Cosmetic documentation fix — no functional impact |
| C | ❌ | Version metadata — documentation only |
| D | ✅ | Data file modification — affects data integrity |
| E | ❌ | Formatting change — no content impact |
| F | ✅ | Config file change — could break connectivity |

\bbox{A, D, F}

answer:
Based on the backup requirement pattern established — any modification to data or configuration files that could cause functional issues or data loss requires a backup:

| Option | Requires .bak | Reason |
|--------|---------------|--------|
| A | ✅ | Config file change — could alter application behavior |
| B | ❌ | Cosmetic documentation fix — no functional impact |
| C | ❌ | Version metadata — documentation only |
| D | ✅ | Data file modification — affects data integrity |
| E | ❌ | Formatting change — no content impact |
| F | ✅ | Config file change — could break connectivity |

\bbox{A, D, F}
